info.exclusivity_note: $3,995 + production per 60 inserts for nose exclusivity (separate from baby seat exclusivity)
info.artwork: Limited to one version per slot
info.bulk_note: 25+ stores must be discussed with management before presenting

production_fees.multi_store_note: Each store @ $395 when all stores sold at one time

upfront.description: Production fee due first, then up to 4 additional monthly equal payments
upfront.first_payment_note: First payment (not deposit) must be 30 days from contract signing

paid_in_full.bonus: Additional 2% commission bonus on commissionable contract price

as_earned.description: Any contract not Upfront will be As Earned (commission paid as customer payments come in)

tiers.label: Over Base - 20% on base + 40% on overage

commissions.two_slot_note: If customer purchases 2 slots, base amount is doubled
commissions.two_customer_note: If 2 customers on a store, each must be over base individually
